stonetop.summary: A sorcerer who anchored his soul to a hidden device and cheated death — paranoid, hoarding secrets.

system.concept: A sorcerer who anchored his soul to a hidden device and cheated death — paranoid, hoarding secrets.
system.description: The book's worked example of a deathless one: a sorcerer corrupted by El'rash-Orra who anchored his soul to an arcane device hidden in a Stone Lord manor. His body is broken and his device must be fed and maintained — destroy it and he dies his final death — but until then he persists, possessing the lithic servants through whose eyes he sees and jealously hoarding his secrets.
